01

ABOUT ME

I'm a Digital Marketing Executive based in Bangalore, working with Maxim Marcom Services, Gurugram — a full-service agency serving some of India's finest hospitality, lifestyle, and consumer brands.

From conceptualising brand strategy to executing multi-platform campaigns that generate real impressions and measurable growth, I bring both creative instinct and data-driven thinking to every project. My background in English Literature gives me a storytelling edge that most marketers don't have.

I've worked on social media grids, SEO content, website UX, and event communications — across sectors from luxury resorts to F&B, education, and manufacturing. I've also published academic research and led large-scale government event communications.
